---
title: 'Patience'
date: '2013-10-16T15:32:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7064553934055396726'
blogger_filename: '/2013/10/patience.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'study'
---

<h4>I got this in Faith to Faith today:</h4><a href="http://e.kcm.org/HM?a=ENX7CqkTRT6y8SA9MKJQs8bnGHxKLn05GvcStGb5lw8W0bBhOG5mpqVsje_Hhe-jNFId" target="_blank">Kenneth Copeland: Faith to Faith</a><br /><table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="width: 100%px;"><tbody><tr><td style="padding: 10px 0px 0px 0px;"><div style="background-color: #ebb963; color: white; font-family: 'Palatino Linotype','Book Antiqua',Palatino,serif; font-size: 18px; margin: 0px; padding: 10px;"><i>Put Patience to Work</i></div></td>                        </tr><tr>                          <td style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px;"><div style="background-color: #e5eaee; background-image: url('http://webr.emv2.com/kcm/email/f2f/en/bg.jpg'); background-repeat: repeat; padding: 10px;"><div style="background-color: white; border: solid 1px #d6e3e9; color: #666666; font-size: 16px; margin: 0px; padding: 10px 20px;">Cast  not away therefore your confidence, which hath great recompence of  reward. For ye have need of patience, that, after ye have done the will  of God, ye might receive the promise. - Hebrews <span class="aBn" data-term="goog_14025048" tabindex="0"><span class="aQJ">10:35</span></span>-36</div></div></td>                        </tr><tr>                          <td style="padding: 0px 15px 15px 15px;"><div style="margin: 15px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">Most  of us have a distorted idea about patience. We think of it as something  designed to help us suffer failure gracefully, but according to these  scriptures, it will actually put us on the path to success!</div><div style="margin: 15px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">Patience  (or being consistently constant) is the power twin of faith. They work  together to see to it that the promises of God are fulfilled in your  life.</div><div style="margin: 15px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">Say, for  example, you need a job. You can go to the Word and see clearly that God  promises to provide your needs. You can see He takes pleasure in the  prosperity of His servants. Once you see that, faith takes hold and you  shout, "Hallelujah, I've got the job I need."</div><div style="margin: 15px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">But what happens to that faith <span class="aBn" data-term="goog_14025049" tabindex="0"><span class="aQJ">tomorrow</span></span> morning when you go to three interviews and get turned down all three  times? Then what? That's when patience has to take over! That's when you  have to make a decision to stay constant, to act as if nothing's  changed.</div><div style="margin: 15px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">The truth is,  if you based your confidence on the Word of God, nothing has changed.  It says exactly the same thing it said yesterday.</div><div style="margin: 15px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">So,  if you'll put patience to work, you know what you're going to say after  those three unsuccessful job interviews? You're going to say,  "Hallelujah, I've got the job I need!" just like you did before.</div><div style="margin: 15px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">You see, faith opens the door to God's promise for you; and patience keeps it open until that promise is fulfilled.</div><div style="margin: 15px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">Do  you have your faith sights set on a promise of God today, a promise  you've been waiting on for some time? Don't let the delay discourage  you. Put patience to work. The Word guarantees you will receive your  reward.</div><i>By Kenneth Copeland </i></td></tr></tbody></table><h4>SO, I took a look at a word search on "<b>Patience</b>", here is the full result...</h4><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/search/?q=patience&amp;c=&amp;t=kjv&amp;ps=100&amp;s=Bibles" target="_blank"></a><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/search/?q=patience&amp;c=&amp;t=kjv&amp;ps=100&amp;s=Bibles" target="_blank">http://www.biblestudytools.com/search/?q=patience&amp;c=&amp;t=kjv&amp;ps=100&amp;s=Bibles </a><br /><br /><div class="Topics" id="TopicResults">Topics: <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/topical-verses/patience-bible-verses/">Patience Bible Verses</a></div><br /><h4>I pulled out the ones that stuck out at me:</h4><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><h4 class="ResultTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/luke/8-15.html">Luke 8:15 KJV</a></h4><div class="ResultText">But  that on  the good  ground  are    they,  which  in  an honest  and  good  heart,  having heard   the  word,  keep   it, and  bring forth fruit   with  <span class="Highlight">patience</span>.&nbsp;</div></blockquote><div class="ResultText"><ul id="Page-1"><li>            <h4 class="ResultTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/luke/21-19.html">Luke 21:19 KJV</a></h4><div class="ResultText">In  your  <span class="Highlight">patience</span>  possess ye   your  souls. </div><div class="QuickLinks"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/luke/21.html">Read Luke 21</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/parallel-bible/passage.aspx?q=Luke+21:19">View in parallel</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/luke/21-19-compare.html">Compare Translations</a>|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=Luke+21:19" id="">Interlinear view</a>            </div></li></ul><div class="ResultText"><b>Thoughts: </b><i>(This refers to the Mind(thoughts), Will(behaviors), and Emotions(feelings). With patience you can be in control of your thoughts, behaviors and feelings.)</i><br /><br /><b>Patience:</b><br /><br /><b>The KJV New Testament Greek Lexicon</b><br /><table style="width: 100%px;"><tbody><tr><td nowrap="nowrap" valign="top">&nbsp;<b>Strong's Number:</b> &nbsp; 5281</td><td align="center" nowrap="nowrap" width="120">&nbsp;<b>&nbsp;</b></td></tr><tr><td colspan="2" valign="top"><table style="width: 100%px;"><tbody><tr><td width="50%"><b>Original Word</b></td><td width="50%"><b>Word Origin</b></td></tr><tr><td valign="top" width="50%"><span class="greek">uJpomonhv</span></td><td valign="top" width="50%">from (<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/greek/kjv/hupomeno.html">5278</a>)</td></tr><tr><td width="50%"><b>Transliterated Word</b></td><td width="50%"><b><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/greek/kjv/hupomone.html#Legend">TDNT</a> Entry</b></td></tr><tr><td valign="top" width="50%">Hupomone</td><td valign="top" width="50%">4:581,581</td></tr><tr><td width="50%"><b>Phonetic Spelling</b></td><td width="50%"><b>Parts of Speech</b></td></tr><tr><td valign="top" width="50%"><i>hoop-om-on-ay'</i>&nbsp;  <span id="LexiconAudio"></span> &nbsp;</td><td valign="top" width="50%">Noun Feminine </td></tr></tbody></table></td></tr><tr><td colspan="2">&nbsp;<b>Definition</b></td></tr><tr><td colspan="2"><br /><ol type="1"><li> steadfastness, constancy, <u><span style="font-size: large;"><b>endurance</b></span></u> <ol type="a"><li> in the NT the characteristic of a man who is not swerved from his  deliberate purpose and his loyalty to faith and piety by even the  greatest trials and sufferings </li><li> patiently, and steadfastly</li></ol></li><li> a patient, steadfast waiting for</li><li> <u><b>a patient enduring, sustaining, perseverance</b></u></li></ol><a href="http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4hXut3DFAeI&amp;feature=c4-overview&amp;list=UUmib6TcAtI-x25fURuwghvA" target="_blank">Rick Renner</a> taught on this word "<a href="http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4hXut3DFAeI&amp;feature=c4-overview&amp;list=UUmib6TcAtI-x25fURuwghvA" target="_blank">Hupomone</a>" see the video, <a href="http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4hXut3DFAeI&amp;feature=c4-overview&amp;list=UUmib6TcAtI-x25fURuwghvA" target="_blank">click here</a>, on Your Tube around 0:38:00 for forward. <br /><div style="text-align: center;"></div></td><td colspan="2"></td><td colspan="2"><br /></td><td colspan="2"></td><td colspan="2"></td><td colspan="2">T </td></tr></tbody></table></div><div class="ResultText"></div>See the following scriptures in light of that... <br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><div class="ResultText"><h4 class="ResultTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/romans/5-3.html">Romans 5:3 KJV</a></h4><h4 class="ResultTitle"></h4></div>1 Therefore being justified by faith, we have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ: 2 By whom also we have access by faith into this grace wherein we stand , and rejoice in hope of the glory of God. 3 And not only so, but we glory in tribulations also: knowing that tribulation worketh patience; 4 And patience, experience; and experience, hope: 5 And hope maketh not ashamed ; because the love of God is shed abroad in our hearts by the Holy Ghost which is given unto us. 6 For when we were yet without strength, in due time Christ died for the ungodly. 7 For scarcely for a righteous man will one die : yet peradventure for a good man some would even dare to die . 8 But God commendeth his love toward us, in that, while we were yet sinners, Christ died for us. 9 Much more then, being now justified by his blood, we shall be saved from wrath through him.  </blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq"><h4 class="ResultTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/colossians/1-11.html">Colossians 1:11 KJV</a></h4>&nbsp;<span class="versetext" id="col1-8" style="display: inline;">   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="col1-9" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">9</span>    <span class="strongs">For</span> this <span class="strongs">cause</span> <span class="strongs">we</span> <span class="strongs">also,</span> <span class="strongs">since</span> <span class="strongs">the</span> <span class="strongs">day</span> we <span class="strongs">heard</span>  it, <span class="strongs">do</span>  <span class="strongs">not</span> <span class="strongs">cease</span>  to <span class="strongs">pray</span>  <span class="strongs">for</span> <span class="strongs">you,</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> to <span class="strongs">desire</span>  <span class="strongs">that</span> ye might be <span class="strongs">filled</span>  with the <span class="strongs">knowledge</span> of <span class="strongs">his</span> <span class="strongs">will</span> <span class="strongs">in</span> <span class="strongs">all</span> <span class="strongs">wisdom</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">spiritual</span> <span class="strongs">understanding;</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="col1-10" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">10</span>    That <span class="strongs">ye</span> might <span class="strongs">walk</span>  <span class="strongs">worthy</span> of the <span class="strongs">Lord</span> <span class="strongs">unto</span> <span class="strongs">all</span> <span class="strongs">pleasing,</span> being <span class="strongs">fruitful</span>  <span class="strongs">in</span> <span class="strongs">every</span> <span class="strongs">good</span> <span class="strongs">work,</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">increasing</span>  <span class="strongs">in</span> the <span class="strongs">knowledge</span> of <span class="strongs">God;</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="col1-11" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">11</span>    <span class="strongs">Strengthened</span>  <span class="strongs">with</span> <span class="strongs">all</span> <span class="strongs">might,</span> according <span class="strongs">to</span> <span class="strongs">his</span> <span class="strongs">glorious</span> <span class="strongs">power,</span> <span class="strongs">unto</span> <span class="strongs">all</span> <span class="strongs">patience</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">longsuffering</span> <span class="strongs">with</span> <span class="strongs">joyfulness;</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="col1-12" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">12</span>    Giving <span class="strongs">thanks</span>  unto the <span class="strongs">Father,</span> <span class="strongs">which</span> hath <span class="strongs">made</span>  <span class="strongs">us</span> <span class="strongs">meet</span>  <span class="strongs">to</span> be <span class="strongs">partakers</span> of the <span class="strongs">inheritance</span> of the <span class="strongs">saints</span> <span class="strongs">in</span> <span class="strongs">light:</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="col1-13" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">13</span>    <span class="strongs">Who</span> hath <span class="strongs">delivered</span>  <span class="strongs">us</span> <span class="strongs">from</span> the <span class="strongs">power</span> of <span class="strongs">darkness,</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> hath <span class="strongs">translated</span>  us <span class="strongs">into</span> the <span class="strongs">kingdom</span> of <span class="strongs">his</span><a href="http://draft.blogger.com/null" name="a"></a> <span class="strongs">dear</span> <span class="strongs">Son:</span>   </span>          </blockquote><span class="versetext" id="col1-14" style="display: inline;"></span><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><h4 class="ResultTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/1-timothy/6-11.html">1 Timothy 6:11 KJV</a></h4>&nbsp;<span class="versetext" id="1ti6-6" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">6</span>    <span class="strongs">But</span> <span class="strongs">godliness</span> <span class="strongs">with</span> <span class="strongs">contentment</span> <span class="strongs">is</span>  <span class="strongs">great</span> <span class="strongs">gain.</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="1ti6-7" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">7</span>    <span class="strongs">For</span> we <span class="strongs">brought</span>  <span class="strongs">nothing</span> <span class="strongs">into</span> this <span class="strongs">world,</span> and it is <span class="strongs">certain</span> <span class="strongs">we</span> <span class="strongs">can</span>  <span class="strongs">carry</span>  <span class="strongs">nothing</span>   <span class="strongs">out</span> .    </span>          <span class="versetext" id="1ti6-8" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">8</span>    <span class="strongs">And</span> <span class="strongs">having</span>  <span class="strongs">food</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">raiment</span> let us <span class="strongs">be</span>  <span class="strongs">therewith</span> <span class="strongs">content</span> .    </span>          <span class="versetext" id="1ti6-9" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">9</span>    <span class="strongs">But</span> they that <span class="strongs">will</span>  be <span class="strongs">rich</span>  <span class="strongs">fall</span>  <span class="strongs">into</span> <span class="strongs">temptation</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> a <span class="strongs">snare,</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> into <span class="strongs">many</span> <span class="strongs">foolish</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">hurtful</span> <span class="strongs">lusts,</span> <span class="strongs">which</span> <span class="strongs">drown</span>  <span class="strongs">men</span> <span class="strongs">in</span> <span class="strongs">destruction</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">perdition.</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="1ti6-10" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">10</span>    <span class="strongs">For</span> the love of <span class="strongs">money</span> <span class="strongs">is</span>  the <span class="strongs">root</span> of <span class="strongs">all</span> <span class="strongs">evil:</span> <span class="strongs">which</span> while <span class="strongs">some</span> coveted <span class="strongs">after</span> , they have <span class="strongs">erred</span><a href="http://draft.blogger.com/null" name="c"></a>  <span class="strongs">from</span> the <span class="strongs">faith,</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">pierced</span>  <span class="strongs">themselves</span> <span class="strongs">through</span>  with <span class="strongs">many</span> <span class="strongs">sorrows.</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="1ti6-11" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">11</span>    <span class="strongs">But</span> <span class="strongs">thou,</span> <span class="strongs">O</span> <span class="strongs">man</span> of <span class="strongs">God,</span> <span class="strongs">flee</span>  these <span class="strongs">things;</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> follow <span class="strongs">after</span>  <span class="strongs">righteousness,</span> <span class="strongs">godliness,</span> <span class="strongs">faith,</span> <span class="strongs">love,</span> <span class="strongs">patience,</span> <span class="strongs">meekness.</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="1ti6-12" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">12</span>    <span class="strongs">Fight</span>  the <span class="strongs">good</span> <span class="strongs">fight</span> of <span class="strongs">faith,</span> lay hold <span class="strongs">on</span>  <span class="strongs">eternal</span> <span class="strongs">life,</span> <span class="strongs">whereunto</span> <span class="strongs">thou</span> <span class="strongs">art</span>  <span class="strongs">also</span> <span class="strongs">called</span> , <span class="strongs">and</span> hast <span class="strongs">professed</span>  a <span class="strongs">good</span> <span class="strongs">profession</span> <span class="strongs">before</span> <span class="strongs">many</span> <span class="strongs">witnesses.</span>   </span><br /><br /><h4 class="ResultTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/2-timothy/3-10.html">2 Timothy 3:10 KJV</a></h4><span class="versetext" id="2ti3-1" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">1</span>    <span class="strongs">This</span> <span class="strongs">know</span>  <span class="strongs">also,</span> <span class="strongs">that</span> <span class="strongs">in</span> the <span class="strongs">last</span> <span class="strongs">days</span> <span class="strongs">perilous</span> <span class="strongs">times</span> shall <span class="strongs">come</span> .    </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2ti3-2" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">2</span>    <span class="strongs">For</span> <span class="strongs">men</span> shall <span class="strongs">be</span>  lovers of their own <span class="strongs">selves,</span> <span class="strongs">covetous,</span> <span class="strongs">boasters,</span> <span class="strongs">proud,</span> <span class="strongs">blasphemers,</span> <span class="strongs">disobedient</span> to <span class="strongs">parents,</span> <span class="strongs">unthankful,</span> <span class="strongs">unholy,</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2ti3-3" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">3</span>    Without natural <span class="strongs">affection,</span> <span class="strongs">trucebreakers,</span> false <span class="strongs">accusers,</span> <span class="strongs">incontinent,</span> <span class="strongs">fierce,</span> despisers of those that are <span class="strongs">good,</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2ti3-4" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">4</span>    <span class="strongs">Traitors,</span> <span class="strongs">heady,</span> <span class="strongs">highminded</span> , lovers of <span class="strongs">pleasures</span> <span class="strongs">more</span> <span class="strongs">than</span> lovers of <span class="strongs">God;</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2ti3-5" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">5</span>    <span class="strongs">Having</span>  a <span class="strongs">form</span> of <span class="strongs">godliness,</span> <span class="strongs">but</span> <span class="strongs">denying</span>  the <span class="strongs">power</span> <span class="strongs">thereof:</span> <span class="strongs">from</span> <span class="strongs">such</span> turn <span class="strongs">away</span> .    </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2ti3-6" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">6</span>    <span class="strongs">For</span> <span class="strongs">of</span> this <span class="strongs">sort</span> are <span class="strongs">they</span>  which <span class="strongs">creep</span>  <span class="strongs">into</span> <span class="strongs">houses,</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> lead <span class="strongs">captive</span>  silly <span class="strongs">women</span> <span class="strongs">laden</span>  with <span class="strongs">sins,</span> led <span class="strongs">away</span>  with <span class="strongs">divers</span> <span class="strongs">lusts,</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2ti3-7" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">7</span>    <span class="strongs">Ever</span> <span class="strongs">learning</span> , <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">never</span> <span class="strongs">able</span>  to <span class="strongs">come</span>  <span class="strongs">to</span> the <span class="strongs">knowledge</span> of the <span class="strongs">truth.</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2ti3-8" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">8</span>    <span class="strongs">Now</span> <span class="strongs">as</span> <span class="strongs">Jannes</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">Jambres</span> <span class="strongs">withstood</span>  <span class="strongs">Moses,</span> <span class="strongs">so</span> <span class="strongs">do</span>  <span class="strongs">these</span> <span class="strongs">also</span> <span class="strongs">resist</span>  the <span class="strongs">truth:</span> <span class="strongs">men</span> of <span class="strongs">corrupt</span>  <span class="strongs">minds,</span> <span class="strongs">reprobate</span><a href="http://draft.blogger.com/null" name="a"></a> <span class="strongs">concerning</span> the <span class="strongs">faith.</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2ti3-9" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">9</span>    <span class="strongs">But</span> they shall <span class="strongs">proceed</span>  <span class="strongs">no</span> <span class="strongs">further</span> <span class="strongs"></span> : <span class="strongs">for</span> <span class="strongs">their</span> <span class="strongs">folly</span> shall <span class="strongs">be</span>  <span class="strongs">manifest</span> unto <span class="strongs">all</span> men, <span class="strongs">as</span> <span class="strongs">theirs</span> <span class="strongs">also</span> <span class="strongs">was</span> .    </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2ti3-10" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">10</span>    <span class="strongs">But</span> <span class="strongs">thou</span> hast fully <span class="strongs">known</span>  <span class="strongs">my</span> <span class="strongs">doctrine,</span> manner of <span class="strongs">life,</span> <span class="strongs">purpose,</span> <span class="strongs">faith,</span> <span class="strongs">longsuffering,</span> <span class="strongs">charity,</span> <span class="strongs">patience,</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2ti3-11" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">11</span>    <span class="strongs">Persecutions,</span> <span class="strongs">afflictions,</span> <span class="strongs">which</span> <span class="strongs">came</span>  unto <span class="strongs">me</span> <span class="strongs">at</span> <span class="strongs">Antioch,</span> <span class="strongs">at</span> <span class="strongs">Iconium,</span> <span class="strongs">at</span> <span class="strongs">Lystra;</span> <span class="strongs">what</span> <span class="strongs">persecutions</span> I <span class="strongs">endured</span> : <span class="strongs">but</span> out <span class="strongs">of</span> them <span class="strongs">all</span> the <span class="strongs">Lord</span> <span class="strongs">delivered</span>  <span class="strongs">me.</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2ti3-12" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">12</span>    <span class="strongs">Yea,</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">all</span> that <span class="strongs">will</span>  <span class="strongs">live</span>  <span class="strongs">godly</span> <span class="strongs">in</span> <span class="strongs">Christ</span> <span class="strongs">Jesus</span> shall suffer <span class="strongs">persecution</span> .    </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2ti3-13" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">13</span>    <span class="strongs">But</span> <span class="strongs">evil</span> <span class="strongs">men</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">seducers</span> shall <span class="strongs">wax</span>  worse and <span class="strongs">worse</span> <span class="strongs"></span>, <span class="strongs">deceiving</span> , <span class="strongs">and</span> being <span class="strongs">deceived</span> .    </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2ti3-14" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">14</span>    <span class="strongs">But</span> <span class="strongs">continue</span>  <span class="strongs">thou</span> <span class="strongs">in</span> the things <span class="strongs">which</span> thou hast <span class="strongs">learned</span>  <span class="strongs">and</span> hast been assured <span class="strongs">of</span> , <span class="strongs">knowing</span>  <span class="strongs">of</span> <span class="strongs">whom</span> thou hast <span class="strongs">learned</span>  them;    </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2ti3-15" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">15</span>    <span class="strongs">And</span> <span class="strongs">that</span> <span class="strongs">from</span> a <span class="strongs">child</span> thou hast <span class="strongs">known</span>  the <span class="strongs">holy</span> <span class="strongs">scriptures,</span> <span class="strongs">which</span> are <span class="strongs">able</span>  to <span class="strongs">make</span>  <span class="strongs">thee</span> <span class="strongs">wise</span>  <span class="strongs">unto</span> <span class="strongs">salvation</span> <span class="strongs">through</span> <span class="strongs">faith</span> <span class="strongs">which</span> is <span class="strongs">in</span> <span class="strongs">Christ</span> <span class="strongs">Jesus.</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2ti3-16" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">16</span>    <span class="strongs">All</span> <span class="strongs">scripture</span> is given by inspiration of <span class="strongs">God,</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> is <span class="strongs">profitable</span> <span class="strongs">for</span> <span class="strongs">doctrine,</span> <span class="strongs">for</span> <span class="strongs">reproof,</span> <span class="strongs">for</span> <span class="strongs">correction,</span> <span class="strongs">for</span> <span class="strongs">instruction</span> <span class="strongs">in</span> <span class="strongs">righteousness:</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2ti3-17" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">17</span>    <span class="strongs">That</span> the <span class="strongs">man</span> of <span class="strongs">God</span> may <span class="strongs">be</span>  <span class="strongs">perfect,</span> throughly <span class="strongs">furnished</span>  <span class="strongs">unto</span> <span class="strongs">all</span> <span class="strongs">good</span> <span class="strongs">works.</span>   </span></blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq"><h4 class="ResultTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/hebrews/6-12.html">Hebrews 6:12 KJV</a></h4><div class="ResultText">That   ye be   not  slothful,  but  followers  of them who through  faith  and  <span class="Highlight">patience</span>  inherit   the promises.&nbsp;</div><div class="ResultText"></div><div class="ResultText"><h4 class="ResultTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/hebrews/10-36.html">Hebrews 10:36 KJV</a></h4><div class="ResultText">For  ye have   need  of <span class="Highlight">patience</span>,  that,  after ye have done   the will  of God,  ye might receive   the promise. </div></div><h4 class="ResultTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/hebrews/12-1.html">Hebrews 12:1 KJV</a> </h4><span class="versetext" id="heb12-1" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">1</span>    <span class="strongs">Wherefore</span> seeing we <span class="strongs">also</span> <span class="strongs">are</span>  compassed <span class="strongs">about</span> <span class="strongs"></span>  with so <span class="strongs">great</span> a <span class="strongs">cloud</span> of <span class="strongs">witnesses,</span> <span class="strongs">let</span>  <span class="strongs">us</span> lay <span class="strongs">aside</span>  <span class="strongs">every</span> <span class="strongs">weight,</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> the <span class="strongs">sin</span> which doth so easily <span class="strongs">beset</span> us, and let us <span class="strongs">run</span>  <span class="strongs">with</span> <span class="strongs">patience</span> the <span class="strongs">race</span> that is set <span class="strongs">before</span>  <span class="strongs">us,</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="heb12-2" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">2</span>    <span class="strongs">Looking</span>  <span class="strongs">unto</span> <span class="strongs">Jesus</span> the <span class="strongs">author</span><a href="http://draft.blogger.com/null" name="a"></a> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">finisher</span> of our <span class="strongs">faith;</span> <span class="strongs">who</span> <span class="strongs">for</span> the <span class="strongs">joy</span> that was set <span class="strongs">before</span>  <span class="strongs">him</span> <span class="strongs">endured</span>  the <span class="strongs">cross,</span> <span class="strongs">despising</span>  the <span class="strongs">shame,</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> is set <span class="strongs">down</span>  <span class="strongs">at</span> the right <span class="strongs">hand</span> of the <span class="strongs">throne</span> of <span class="strongs">God.</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="heb12-3" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">3</span>    <span class="strongs">For</span> <span class="strongs">consider</span>  him that <span class="strongs">endured</span>  <span class="strongs">such</span> <span class="strongs">contradiction</span> <span class="strongs">of</span> <span class="strongs">sinners</span> <span class="strongs">against</span> <span class="strongs">himself,</span> <span class="strongs">lest</span> ye be <span class="strongs">wearied</span>  and <span class="strongs">faint</span>  in <span class="strongs">your</span> <span class="strongs">minds.</span></span></blockquote><br /><br />James has a LOT to say about this...<br /><ul id="Page-1"><li>            <h4 class="ResultTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/james/1-3.html">James 1:3 KJV</a></h4><div class="ResultText">Knowing   this, that  the trying  of your  faith  worketh   <span class="Highlight">patience</span>. </div><div class="QuickLinks"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/james/1.html">Read James 1</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/parallel-bible/passage.aspx?q=James+1:3">View in parallel</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/james/1-3-compare.html">Compare Translations</a>|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=James+1:3" id="">Interlinear view</a>            </div></li><li>            <h4 class="ResultTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/james/1-4.html">James 1:4 KJV</a></h4><div class="ResultText">But  let   <span class="Highlight">patience</span>  have   her perfect  work,  that  ye may be   perfect  and  entire,  wanting   nothing   .</div><div class="QuickLinks"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/james/1.html">Read James 1</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/parallel-bible/passage.aspx?q=James+1:4">View in parallel</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/james/1-4-compare.html">Compare Translations</a>|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=James+1:4" id="">Interlinear view</a>            </div></li><li>            <h4 class="ResultTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/james/5-7.html">James 5:7 KJV</a></h4><div class="ResultText">Be patient   therefore,  brethren,   unto  the coming  of the Lord.  Behold  , the husbandman  waiteth   for  the precious  fruit  of the earth,  and hath long <span class="Highlight">patience</span>   for  it,  until  he  receive   the early  and  latter  rain. </div><div class="QuickLinks"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/james/5.html">Read James 5</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/parallel-bible/passage.aspx?q=James+5:7">View in parallel</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/james/5-7-compare.html">Compare Translations</a>|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=James+5:7" id="">Interlinear view</a>            </div></li><li>            <h4 class="ResultTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/james/5-10.html">James 5:10 KJV</a></h4><div class="ResultText">Take  , my  brethren,  the prophets,   who  have spoken   in the name  of the Lord,  for an example  of  suffering affliction,  and  of <span class="Highlight">patience</span>. </div><div class="QuickLinks"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/james/5.html">Read James 5</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/parallel-bible/passage.aspx?q=James+5:10">View in parallel</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/james/5-10-compare.html">Compare Translations</a>|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=James+5:10" id="">Interlinear view</a>            </div></li><li>            <h4 class="ResultTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/james/5-11.html">James 5:11 KJV</a></h4><div class="ResultText">Behold  , we count them happy   which endure  . Ye have heard   of the <span class="Highlight">patience</span>  of Job,  and  have seen   the end  of the Lord;  that  the Lord  is   very pitiful,  and  of tender mercy. </div><div class="QuickLinks"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/james/5.html">Read James 5</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/parallel-bible/passage.aspx?q=James+5:11">View in parallel</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/james/5-11-compare.html">Compare Translations</a>|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=James+5:11" id="">Interlinear view</a>            </div></li></ul><blockquote class="tr_bq"><h4 class="ResultTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/2-peter/1-6.html">2 Peter 1:6 KJV</a></h4><span class="versetext" id="2pe1-1" style="display: inline;">   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2pe1-2" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">2</span>    <span class="strongs">Grace</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">peace</span> be <span class="strongs">multiplied</span>  unto <span class="strongs">you</span> <span class="strongs">through</span> the <span class="strongs">knowledge</span> of <span class="strongs">God,</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> of <span class="strongs">Jesus</span> <span class="strongs">our</span> <span class="strongs">Lord,</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2pe1-3" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">3</span>    According <span class="strongs">as</span> <span class="strongs">his</span> <span class="strongs">divine</span> <span class="strongs">power</span> hath <span class="strongs">given</span>  unto <span class="strongs">us</span> all <span class="strongs">things</span> that pertain <span class="strongs">unto</span> <span class="strongs">life</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">godliness,</span> <span class="strongs">through</span> the <span class="strongs">knowledge</span> of him that hath <span class="strongs">called</span>  <span class="strongs">us</span> <span class="strongs">to</span><a href="http://draft.blogger.com/null" name="b"></a> <span class="strongs">glory</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">virtue:</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2pe1-4" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">4</span>    <span class="strongs">Whereby</span> <span class="strongs">are</span> <span class="strongs">given</span>  unto <span class="strongs">us</span> exceeding <span class="strongs">great</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">precious</span> <span class="strongs">promises:</span> <span class="strongs">that</span> <span class="strongs">by</span> <span class="strongs">these</span> ye might <span class="strongs">be</span>  <span class="strongs">partakers</span> of the <span class="strongs">divine</span> <span class="strongs">nature,</span> having <span class="strongs">escaped</span>  the <span class="strongs">corruption</span> that is <span class="strongs">in</span> the <span class="strongs">world</span> <span class="strongs">through</span> <span class="strongs">lust.</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2pe1-5" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">5</span>    <span class="strongs">And</span> <span class="strongs"></span>  <span class="strongs">beside</span> <span class="strongs">this,</span> <span class="strongs">giving</span>  <span class="strongs">all</span> <span class="strongs">diligence,</span> <span class="strongs">add</span>  <span class="strongs">to</span> <span class="strongs">your</span> <span class="strongs">faith</span> <span class="strongs">virtue;</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">to</span> <span class="strongs">virtue</span> <span class="strongs">knowledge;</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2pe1-6" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">6</span>    <span class="strongs">And</span> <span class="strongs">to</span> <span class="strongs">knowledge</span> <span class="strongs">temperance;</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">to</span> <span class="strongs">temperance</span> <span class="strongs">patience;</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">to</span> <span class="strongs">patience</span> <span class="strongs">godliness;</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2pe1-7" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">7</span>    <span class="strongs">And</span> <span class="strongs">to</span> <span class="strongs">godliness</span> brotherly <span class="strongs">kindness;</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">to</span> brotherly <span class="strongs">kindness</span> <span class="strongs">charity.</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2pe1-8" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">8</span>    <span class="strongs">For</span> if these <span class="strongs">things</span> <span class="strongs">be</span>  in <span class="strongs">you,</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">abound</span> , they <span class="strongs">make</span>  you that ye shall <span class="strongs">neither</span> be <span class="strongs">barren</span><a href="http://draft.blogger.com/null" name="c"></a> <span class="strongs">nor</span> <span class="strongs">unfruitful</span> <span class="strongs">in</span> the <span class="strongs">knowledge</span> of <span class="strongs">our</span> <span class="strongs">Lord</span> <span class="strongs">Jesus</span> <span class="strongs">Christ.</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2pe1-9" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">9</span>    <span class="strongs">But</span> he <span class="strongs">that</span> <span class="strongs">lacketh</span> <span class="strongs"></span>  these <span class="strongs">things</span> <span class="strongs">is</span>  <span class="strongs">blind,</span> and cannot see afar <span class="strongs">off</span> , and hath <span class="strongs">forgotten</span> <span class="strongs"></span>  that he was purged <span class="strongs">from</span> <span class="strongs">his</span> <span class="strongs">old</span> <span class="strongs">sins.</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2pe1-10" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">10</span>    <span class="strongs">Wherefore</span> the <span class="strongs">rather,</span> <span class="strongs">brethren,</span> give <span class="strongs">diligence</span>  to <span class="strongs">make</span>  <span class="strongs">your</span> <span class="strongs">calling</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">election</span> <span class="strongs">sure:</span> <span class="strongs">for</span> if ye <span class="strongs">do</span>  these <span class="strongs">things,</span> ye <span class="strongs">shall</span> <span class="strongs"></span>   <span class="strongs">never</span> <span class="strongs">fall</span> <span class="strongs"></span> :    </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2pe1-11" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">11</span>    <span class="strongs">For</span> <span class="strongs">so</span> an <span class="strongs">entrance</span> shall be <span class="strongs">ministered</span>  unto <span class="strongs">you</span> <span class="strongs">abundantly</span> <span class="strongs">into</span> the <span class="strongs">everlasting</span> <span class="strongs">kingdom</span> of <span class="strongs">our</span> <span class="strongs">Lord</span> <span class="strongs">and</span> <span class="strongs">Saviour</span> <span class="strongs">Jesus</span> <span class="strongs">Christ.</span>   </span>          <span class="versetext" id="2pe1-12" style="display: inline;"><span class="versenum">12</span>    <span class="strongs">Wherefore</span> I <span class="strongs">will</span>  <span class="strongs">not</span> be <span class="strongs">negligent</span>  to <span class="strongs">put</span>  <span class="strongs">you</span> <span class="strongs">always</span> in <span class="strongs">remembrance</span>  <span class="strongs">of</span> these <span class="strongs">things,</span> <span class="strongs">though</span> ye <span class="strongs">know</span>  them, <span class="strongs">and</span> be <span class="strongs">established</span>  <span class="strongs">in</span> the <span class="strongs">present</span>  <span class="strongs">truth</span></span></blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq"><h4 class="ResultTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/revelation/3-10.html">Revelation 3:10 KJV</a></h4><div class="ResultText">Because  thou hast kept   the word  of my  <span class="Highlight">patience</span>,   I also  will keep   thee  from  the hour  of temptation,  which  shall  come      upon  all  the world,  to try   them that dwell   upon  the  earth. </div></blockquote><br /></div><b>I call you empowered 2 prosper with good success!</b><br /><b><br /></b><b>N2 Good Success</b><b><span style="font-size: x-small;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span></b><br />Blog:&nbsp;<a href="http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/" style="background-color: white;" target="_blank">http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/</a><br />Facebook:&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Empowered-To-Prosper/231019763613118" target="_blank">Facebook.Com/EmpoweredTooProsper</a><br />Twitter:&nbsp;<a href="http://twitter.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">http://twitter.com/n2goodsuccess</a><br /><br /><b style="background-color: white;">See Also:</b><br />Books by Darrell G. Wolfe:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.amazon.com/Darrell-Wolfe/e/B008F07FO6" style="font-family: verdana, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px;" target="_blank">Amazon.com/author/darrellgwolfe&nbsp;</a><br />Book Suggestions from the&nbsp;<a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/190-6424964-9305846" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Amazon Store</a><br />Brand and Product Offerings from&nbsp;<a href="http://www.zazzle.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Zazzle Store</a>
